{{Quote|And try not to blow up any more tankers, ''jai'galaar''. They're fun to watch -- but I'd like to get to Coruscant before my son has sons of his own!|Cassus Fett|<ref name="KOTOR 23" />}}
[[Cassus Fett]] had a '''son''' at the time of the [[Taris Siege|siege of Taris]]. While overseeing the siege, Cassus Fett remarked to one of the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] under his command that he wanted to reach [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before his son had children of his own.<ref name="KOTOR 23" />
